name: Crispy String Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound string beans, trimmed and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 cups of the oil in a wok and add the beans. Fry for one minute or until soft.
2. Drain the beans.
3. In a sauté pan, heat the remaining oil.
4. Add the beans, garlic, minced pork, soy sauce, sherry, sugar, and broth to the pan.
5. Stir in the sesame oil and scallion, swirling to heat through.
6. Serve.
